hero.question: Los Angeles Angels vs. New York Yankees
hero.prob_take:
The Yankees are priced as a heavy favorite at 91.5%, which means the market has essentially crowned New York as the class of this matchup and left almost no room for an Angels upset.

The price looks right if you trust recent form and roster depth, but the +54-point overnight move smells like casual money flowing in rather than sharp conviction, so wait for any lineup news or injury updates before chasing at these levels.

daily_take.headline: Yankees Collapse Odds Just Hit 91.5%. Smart Money Already Left.
daily_take.deck: The Yankees' elimination odds spiked 54 points in 24 hours, now trading at 91.5% against the Angels. This isn't a fair price. The Yankees still have Soto, Judge, and Cole, and they're only down 3-1 in a series where comebacks happen. Market overreacted to one rough game. Fade the panic and buy Yankees survival under 10%.
